Operation 'findCurrencies' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate and action-oriented. Description is too minimal and lacks important details about what data is returned and how to navigate results. Enhanced description clarifies the response structure (codes, names, country mappings), mentions pagination support (consistent with the 3 parameters likely being limit/offset/sort), and better helps AI agents understand the operation's scope and capabilities.

data.current_description: Get a list of currencies with their associated country codes.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a list of all available currencies with their associated country codes and locale information. Returns currency data including codes, names, and country mappings. Supports pagination via limit and offset parameters.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate and action-oriented. Description is too minimal and lacks important details about what data is returned and how to navigate results. Enhanced description clarifies the response structure (codes, names, country mappings), mentions pagination support (consistent with the 3 parameters likely being limit/offset/sort), and better helps AI agents understand the operation's scope and capabilities.

message: Operation 'findLocales' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is concise but description is overly generic. The phrase 'known locales' lacks specificity about what constitutes a locale in this API context. Enhanced description clarifies that locales include language and region information, specifies the type of data returned, and indicates pagination/sorting support. This helps AI agents better understand when to use this operation and what to expect.
